title: Rumyve20 Yard Daisy Flower Lace Decoration,White Lace Decoration Sewing Applique Sewing Craft Wedding DIY Style
features: Daisy Lace embellishment: This decorative embroidery lace has an elegant Daisy flower pattern and is delicate and soft in texture. You can use them in rows or individually, as they are easy to separate.

Soft & heavy special knit: Daisy ribbon is made of high-quality polyester fiber, soft and delicate, burr free, and will not deteriorate even after long use because it is thick enough to stretch and bend without tearing easily. Daisy ribbon knitwear is easy to clean after use and can be used repeatedly.

A wide range of applications: suitable for skirts, jeans, T-shirts, jackets, dolls, pillowcases, vases, wedding bouquets, photo frames, scrapbooks, etc. Daisy white lace webbing can be used for weddings, parties, birthdays, Christmas, etc.

Creative design: Lace ribbon designed with Daisy as the theme, beautiful and simple, each flower is lovely and delicate, looking more elegant. Suitable for gift wrapping and sewing decoration. They can also be applied to tassel curtains on doors to add an elegant touch to a room.

What you get: The package includes a roll of Daisy lace ribbon, which is about 20 yards long and 18 mm wide. The white lace trim lasts long enough to be used for your craft project and can be cut down to a single flower or the length you want.
